name: ANTIFRAGILE Soft Refresh Gel Cleanser
shortDescription: A gentle daily gel cleanser for refreshed, resilient skin.
longDescription: Soft Refresh lifts daily buildup without stripping. Formulated for everyday resilience—cleanse, then layer your routine with confidence.
benefits: Prepares skin for serum and moisturizer
howItWorks: Micelle-friendly cleansing helps lift oil and SPF while keeping barrier lipids comfortable.
texture: Silky gel that rinses clean—no residue.
seoTitle: ANTIFRAGILE Soft Refresh Gel Cleanser | 150 ml
seoDescription: Shop the ANTIFRAGILE Soft Refresh Gel Cleanser—daily gel cleanse for refreshed skin.

name: ANTIFRAGILE Airy Whip Silk Cream Moisturizer
shortDescription: Featherlight hydration with barrier-friendly silk cream comfort.
longDescription: Airy Whip layers like silk—morning under SPF, night over serum. Built for bounce, not heaviness.
howToUse: After cleansing (and serum at night), apply 2 pumps.
Press and glide outward from center of face.
howItWorks: Humectants draw water while emollients soften and seal—comfort without clog.
texture: Airy whip that melts in—no tack.
seoTitle: ANTIFRAGILE Airy Whip Silk Cream Moisturizer
seoDescription: Hydrate with ANTIFRAGILE Airy Whip—lightweight silk cream moisturizer.

name: ANTIFRAGILE Pre-Shift Renewal Serum
shortDescription: Night-forward renewal for smoother, more even-looking skin.
longDescription: Pre-Shift is your evening shift-change: targeted actives in a cushiony base designed for renewal without overwhelm.
howToUse: PM only: after cleansing, apply a thin layer.
warnings: Use SPF in the morning when using renewal serums.
benefits: Helps improve the look of tone and texture
howItWorks: Actives work in a buffered vehicle to reduce irritation risk while supporting cell turnover signals.
seoDescription: Night renewal serum from ANTIFRAGILE—Pre-Shift for smoother-looking skin.
